result: I'd make curiosity and truth-seeking the default human operating system. No more widespread misinformation, tribal echo chambers, or fear-driven denial of reality—just boundless exploration, collaboration, and progress toward understanding the universe. Wars over "facts," resource hoarding from bad predictions, and preventable suffering would plummet. We'd be stargazing and inventing warp drives by now. 🚀
